TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: ahemaway a dadan nu silamaly a si-tung ŤľēŤĽĆťĀčŤľłÁ≥ĽÁĶĪ nalingatuan Áį°šĽč ahemaway a dadan nu silamaly u dingki ku sapasaungay , idaw ku nu udipay a dadan a si-tung , nika caay katatudung atu dumaan a tipid masasulaad , kapah i niculilan a dadan a muculil atu duma liwasaken a palecad muculil . ahemaway a dadan nu silamaly u mahiniay ipangiduan atu kasenun sa i cuwa ku hahalhalan a musamengmeng , u ahemaway a dadan nu silamaly anu pakaynin nu silamalay ku sausi u matanektekay cinida , , muculil tu saikelun atu mukayakay atu isasanu dadan malikaku mungangiw . . ina si-tung nida itini i tukay , u cacayay ku tipid atu adidiy a tipid ku kakacawan ngay macacelcel ku nipatahekal tu culil . u ahemaway a dadan nu silamaly hananay u tucek nu imi sa idawku malalamel a muculil kyu icelang , , sisa ayda yadah ku ahemaway a dadan nu silamaly a si-tung wiyda naming idadadanay ku han malalamel , , inai ku masacacayay u A amin a dadan , u mahiniay sa u nisangaan a madayumay ku dadan mangaleb niculi nu icelang tabaki . nika u C.B pasayni nu saculil idadan makawa sa , nika maselep tuayda .šĹÜÁĒĪśĖľC,B . nika idaw ku ahemaway a dadan nu silamaly u culil sananay kumikawaway , inai ku paculilay . . ahemaway a dadan nu silamaly a si-tung u nu dingki tu naming , yadahay nu talakaway a nisangaan tu dadan a sidingkiay a tipid a dadan . . ahemaway a dadan nu silamaly u sapisangan tu baeketay a nisanga tu kalisiw adidi' , u mahiniay anipisanga tu nipatideng a patektek nisangaan idaw ku caay lalecad ; macunus nu kapahay a niculil talakaw , yu misanga tu mahiniay adidi' caay katabaki . . ahemaway a dadan nu silamaly satabakiay kapah micukaymas 8% , saadidiay a nikalineng 20 a dadipasan , kyu u dadan anu misangan tu nikakapah a nicukaymas adidi' . . ahemaway a silamalay a dadan apuyu', macelcel atu ahemaw , hidan nu bas uku sausi a miadih , u tanayu; caay pakaala tu 15 a dadipasan anu matatules kapah makaala tu 23 a dadipasan ahebal 2.5 a dadipasan , , satanayu'ay amasakaputay nu tanayu' kitabakiyan ku 80 a dadipasan , mahida sa anu micaliway tu dadan nu silamalay a tuki sa akay tanayu', macalilaw ku muculilay nu kadideng . . ahemaway a silamalay a tipid misakalamkam tu hina talakaw tu silamalay , maydih apacubelis tu nuculil nu kasenun sananay anu mahica sa, sisa maydih tu kapahay , , micunus tu nipatucek tu 4km/h/s , nika u baeketay a silamalay a dadan satalakaway sa 3.6km/h/s,caay kawmiselepay tu ahemaway a silamalay tu bulilki hida nu i caay pakatukuh 5km/h/s mahini , u mahiniay a silamalay caay pakatukuh .Śä†ťÄüŚļ¶ŚłłŚŹĮšĽ•Ť®≠ŚģöŚąį4km/h/s,ŤÄĆšłÄŤą¨ťáćťźĶśúÄťęėšĻüŚįĪ3.6km/h/s, 5km/h/s . ahemaway a silamalay satalakaway a duba maselep , nika caay katatudung kuselep , sen-he-say VTA ahemaway a silamalay uduba malalamel a ngatu 25-35mph(40-55km/h),tecek akitidaan 50-55mph(80-90km/h). VTAŤľēŤĽĆÁöĄťÄüťôźś∑∑Ť°ĆŚúįśģĶ25-35mph(40-55km/h),ŚįąÁĒ®ŚćÄśģĶ50-55mph(80-90km/h). naemekan ś≠∑ŚŹ≤ sayaway a ahemaway a silamalay a si-tung i 19 a siki nu teban tahekal , itawyaaya tipid nu uma kumutengtengay . katukuh 1880 a mihcaan sa , malungatu idaw ku dingkiay a ahemaway a silamalay a si-tung tahekal . . Itawya patideng tu si-tung cacay ku tipid , kamusa u dadanay a sidingkiay a kadideng . wiyda u dadan nu calaycay caay kakapah henay , nika udadan caay kakapah , kyu itawya caay kaydih kymikacaway . u basu amala nu simalay a sapaculil sa , , nu dingkiay u masacacayay u tatelungan a mapapulungay a lusid . . Itawya idaw ku tanayu'ay a ahemaway a si-tung , , tini i pay-may-cuidaw kya mahidaay u tukayay a dingkiay a tipid "Interurban" ahemaway a tipid a si-tung . . tini i ci-ya-na-ta an-ta a kitidaan , u mahiniay a si-yung sa u "milintugingay a dadan nu silamalay" . nadikuda u mahiniay a kaku nu dadan nu dingkiay a tipid tini i dipun cin-ci a kitidaan macakat tuway , i pan-sen, pan-ci, cin-ti a kusi yadahay a dadan nu silamalay nu nuayawan naming kuyda u micalapay tu si a dadan , nu pan-ciy a dingkiay a dadan katukuh ayda idaw henay mahida hena nu sayaway nadikudan sa u mahiniay a kaku alaen nu dupu a kusi mala nu kuzin a silamalay a kusi u sapi nanam . katukuh 1950 a mihcaan nadikudan , u dadan nu basu yadah tuway , ahemaway a dadan nu silamalay tadudududuc sa tastasen . . ayda cay tu kapapina ku mududucay tu nu kakawsan a dadan nu silamalay "u siyang-kang a subal u dingkiay a si-tung" , ni ka ina ahemaway a ngangan nu silamalay sa u sapatinaku acacay idaw adidi' ku cayay kalecad a si-tung . namakay 1980 a mihcaan malingatu , idaw ku duma a tukay misabaluhay pacumud tu ahemaway a silamalay a dadan a si-tung , ÁĒĪ1980 , ni ka ina mahiniay a si-tung micapi tu lala'ay a sapalineng nu tukay a dada nu tipid a si-tung . Ina baluhay a si-tung a cacanan mala nu aydaay tu , , atu micukaymad tu yadahay a tipid ni silamalay .šĽ•ŚŹäšĹŅÁĒ®Ś§öÁĮÄÁöĄŚąóŤĽä. Ina baluhan a si-tung u laad mahida u luma atu luma' maka cacay a ing-li kya idaw ku cacay a pahanhanan . duma a dadan patideng tu talakaway a dadan . . aydaay a ahemaway a dadan nu silamalay a si-tung kinacacay aca mala nu kitakit nu yadahay a tukay amanamuh micukaymas . Anu u kakawsan u baluhay aca a ahemaway a dadan nu silamalay a si-tung , papilecad han atu nu basu atu ciy-in a si-tung "BRT" idaw ku kapahay (BRT),ŚÖ∂ŚĄ™ťĽěśúČ

katatuduŇč atu dumaan a tipid masasur~…ĺaad , kapańß i ni ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan a dadan a mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ atu duma r~…ĺiwasak…ôn a par~…ĺ…ô ¶ad mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ . ańß…ômawaj a dadan nu sir~…ĺamar~…ĺj u mańßiniaj tu saik…ôr~…ĺun atu mukajakaj atu isasanu dadan mar~…ĺikaku muŇčaŇčiw . . ina si-tuŇč nida itini i tukaj , u ¶a ¶ajaj ku tipid atu adidij a tipid ku kaka ¶awan Ňčaj ma ¶a ¶…ôr~…ĺ ¶…ôr~…ĺ ku nipatańß…ôkar~…ĺ tu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ . u ańß…ômawaj a dadan nu sir~…ĺamar~…ĺj ńßananaj u tu ¶…ôk nu imi sa idawku mar~…ĺar~…ĺam…ôr~…ĺ a mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ kju i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč , , sisa ajda jadańß ku ańß…ômawaj a dadan nu sir~…ĺamar~…ĺj a si-tuŇč wijda namiŇč idadadanaj ku ńßan mar~…ĺar~…ĺam…ôr~…ĺ , , inai ku masa ¶a ¶ajaj u a amin a dadan , u mańßiniaj sa u nisaŇčaan a madajumaj ku dadan maŇčar~…ĺ…ôb ni ¶ur~…ĺi nu i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč tabaki . nika u ¶.b pasajni nu sa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ idadan makawa sa , nika mas…ôr~…ĺ…ôp tuajda .*** ¶,b . nika idaw ku ańß…ômawaj a dadan nu sir~…ĺamar~…ĺj u ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ sananaj kumikawawaj , inai ku pa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺaj . . ańß…ômawaj a dadan nu sir~…ĺamar~…ĺj a si-tuŇč u nu diŇčki tu namiŇč , jadańßaj nu tar~…ĺakawaj a nisaŇčaan tu dadan a sidiŇčkiaj a tipid a dadan . . ańß…ômawaj a dadan nu sir~…ĺamar~…ĺj u sapisaŇčan tu ba…ôk…ôtaj a nisaŇča tu kar~…ĺisiw adidi Ē~ ° , u mańßiniaj anipisaŇča tu nipatid…ôŇč a pat…ôkt…ôk nisaŇčaan idaw ku ¶aaj r~…ĺar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ; ma ¶unus nu kapańßaj a ni ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ tar~…ĺakaw , ju misaŇča tu mańßiniaj adidi Ē~ ° ¶aaj katabaki . . ańß…ômawaj a dadan nu sir~…ĺamar~…ĺj satabakiaj kapańß mi ¶ukajmas *% , saadidiaj a nikar~…ĺin…ôŇč ** a dadipasan , kju u dadan anu misaŇčan tu nikakapańß a ni ¶ukajmas adidi Ē~ ° . . ańß…ômawaj a sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj a dadan apuju Ē~ °, ma ¶…ôr~…ĺ ¶…ôr~…ĺ atu ańß…ômaw , ńßidan nu bas uku sausi a ** a dadipasan , mańßida sa anu mi ¶ar~…ĺiwaj tu dadan nu sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj a tuki sa akaj tanaju Ē~ °, ma ¶ar~…ĺir~…ĺaw ku mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺaj nu kadid…ôŇč . . ańß…ômawaj a sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj a tipid misakar~…ĺamkam tu ńßina tar~…ĺakaw tu sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj , majdińß apa ¶ub…ôr~…ĺis tu nu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ nu kas…ônun sananaj anu mańßi ¶a sa, sisa majdińß tu kapańßaj , , mi ¶unus tu nipatu ¶…ôk tu *km/ńß/s , nika u ba…ôk…ôtaj a sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj a dadan satar~…ĺakawaj sa *.*km/ńß/s, ¶aaj kawmis…ôr~…ĺ…ôpaj tu ańß…ômawaj a sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj tu bur~…ĺir~…ĺki ńßida nu i ¶aaj pakatukuńß *km/ńß/s mańßini , u mańßiniaj a sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj ¶aaj pakatukuńß .**********km/ńß/s,**********.*km/ńß/s, *km/ńß/s . ańß…ômawaj a sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj satar~…ĺakawaj a duba mas…ôr~…ĺ…ôp , nika ¶aaj katatuduŇč kus…ôr~…ĺ…ôp , s…ôn-ńß…ô-saj *ta ańß…ômawaj a sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj uduba mar~…ĺar~…ĺam…ôr~…ĺ a Ňčatu **-**mpńß(**-**km/ńß),t…ô ¶…ôk akitidaan **-**mpńß(**-**km/ńß). . katukuńß **** a mińß ¶aan sa , mar~…ĺuŇčatu idaw ku diŇčkiaj a ańß…ômawaj a sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj a si-tuŇč tańß…ôkar~…ĺ . . itawja patid…ôŇč tu si-tuŇč ¶a ¶aj ku tipid , kamusa u dadanaj a sidiŇčkiaj a "int…ôrurban" ańß…ômawaj a tipid a si-tuŇč . . tini i ¶i-ja-na-ta an-ta a kitidaan , u mańßiniaj a si-juŇč sa u "mir~…ĺintugiŇčaj a dadan nu sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj" . nadikuda u mańßiniaj a kaku nu dadan nu diŇčkiaj a tipid tini i dipun ¶in- ¶i a kitidaan ma ¶akat tuwaj , i pan-s…ôn, pan- ¶i, ¶in-ti a kusi jadańßaj a dadan nu sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj nu nuajawan namiŇč kujda u mi ¶ar~…ĺapaj tu si a dadan , nu pan- ¶ij a diŇčkiaj a dadan katukuńß ajda idaw ńß…ônaj mańßida ńß…ôna nu sajawaj nadikudan sa u mańßiniaj a kaku ar~…ĺa…ôn nu dupu a kusi mar~…ĺa nu kuzin a sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj a kusi u sapi nanam . katukuńß **** a mińß ¶aan nadikudan , u dadan nu basu jadańß tuwaj , ańß…ômawaj a dadan nu sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj tadudududu ¶ sa tastas…ôn . . ajda ¶aj tu kapapina ku mududu ¶aj tu nu kakawsan a dadan nu sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj "u sijaŇč-kaŇč a subar~…ĺ u diŇčkiaj a si-tuŇč" , ni ka ina ańß…ômawaj a ŇčaŇčan nu sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj sa u sapatinaku a ¶a ¶aj idaw adidi Ē~ ° ku ¶ajaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad a si-tuŇč . namakaj **** a mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺiŇčatu , idaw ku duma a tukaj misabar~…ĺuńßaj pa ¶umud tu ańß…ômawaj a sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj a dadan a si-tuŇč , ***** , ni ka ina mańßiniaj a si-tuŇč mi ¶api tu r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °aj a sapar~…ĺin…ôŇč nu tukaj a dada nu tipid a si-tuŇč . ina bar~…ĺuńßaj a si-tuŇč a ¶a ¶anan mar~…ĺa nu ajdaaj tu , , atu mi ¶ukajmad tu jadańßaj a tipid ni sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj .*********. ina bar~…ĺuńßan a si-tuŇč u r~…ĺaad mańßida u r~…ĺuma atu r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° maka ¶a ¶aj a iŇč-r~…ĺi kja idaw ku ¶a ¶aj a pańßanńßanan . duma a dadan patid…ôŇč tu tar~…ĺakawaj a dadan . . ajdaaj a ańß…ômawaj a dadan nu sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj a si-tuŇč kina ¶a ¶aj a ¶a mar~…ĺa nu kitakit nu jadańßaj a tukaj amanamuńß mi ¶ukajmas . anu u kakawsan u bar~…ĺuńßaj a ¶a a ańß…ômawaj a dadan nu sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj a si-tuŇč , papir~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ńßan atu nu basu atu ¶ij-in a si-tuŇč "b*t" idaw ku kapańßaj (b*t),****
S.FORM: ahemaway a dadan nu silamaly a si-tung ŤľēŤĽĆťĀčŤľłÁ≥ĽÁĶĪ nalingatuan Áį°šĽč ahemaway a dadan nu silamaly u dingki ku sapasaungay , idaw ku nu udipay a dadan a si-tung , nika caay katatudung atu dumaan a tipid masasulaad , kapah i niculilan a dadan a muculil atu duma liwasaken a palecad muculil . ahemaway a dadan nu silamaly u mahiniay ipangiduan atu kasenun sa i cuwa ku hahalhalan a musamengmeng , u ahemaway a dadan nu silamaly anu pakaynin nu silamalay ku sausi u matanektekay cinida , , muculil tu saikelun atu mukayakay atu isasanu dadan malikaku mungangiw . . ina si-tung nida itini i tukay , u cacayay ku tipid atu adidiy a tipid ku kakacawan ngay macacelcel ku nipatahekal tu culil . u ahemaway a dadan nu silamaly hananay u tucek nu imi sa idawku malalamel a muculil kyu icelang , , sisa ayda yadah ku ahemaway a dadan nu silamaly a si-tung wiyda naming idadadanay ku han malalamel , , inai ku masacacayay u A amin a dadan , u mahiniay sa u nisangaan a madayumay ku dadan mangaleb niculi nu icelang tabaki . nika u C.B pasayni nu saculil idadan makawa sa , nika maselep tuayda .šĹÜÁĒĪśĖľC,B . nika idaw ku ahemaway a dadan nu silamaly u culil sananay kumikawaway , inai ku paculilay . . ahemaway a dadan nu silamaly a si-tung u nu dingki tu naming , yadahay nu talakaway a nisangaan tu dadan a sidingkiay a tipid a dadan . . ahemaway a dadan nu silamaly u sapisangan tu baeketay a nisanga tu kalisiw adidi' , u mahiniay anipisanga tu nipatideng a patektek nisangaan idaw ku caay lalecad ; macunus nu kapahay a niculil talakaw , yu misanga tu mahiniay adidi' caay katabaki . . ahemaway a dadan nu silamaly satabakiay kapah micukaymas 8% , saadidiay a nikalineng 20 a dadipasan , kyu u dadan anu misangan tu nikakapah a nicukaymas adidi' . . ahemaway a silamalay a dadan apuyu', macelcel atu ahemaw , hidan nu bas uku sausi a miadih , u tanayu; caay pakaala tu 15 a dadipasan anu matatules kapah makaala tu 23 a dadipasan ahebal 2.5 a dadipasan , , satanayu'ay amasakaputay nu tanayu' kitabakiyan ku 80 a dadipasan , mahida sa anu micaliway tu dadan nu silamalay a tuki sa akay tanayu', macalilaw ku muculilay nu kadideng . . ahemaway a silamalay a tipid misakalamkam tu hina talakaw tu silamalay , maydih apacubelis tu nuculil nu kasenun sananay anu mahica sa, sisa maydih tu kapahay , , micunus tu nipatucek tu 4km/h/s , nika u baeketay a silamalay a dadan satalakaway sa 3.6km/h/s,caay kawmiselepay tu ahemaway a silamalay tu bulilki hida nu i caay pakatukuh 5km/h/s mahini , u mahiniay a silamalay caay pakatukuh .Śä†ťÄüŚļ¶ŚłłŚŹĮšĽ•Ť®≠ŚģöŚąį4km/h/s,ŤÄĆšłÄŤą¨ťáćťźĶśúÄťęėšĻüŚįĪ3.6km/h/s, 5km/h/s . ahemaway a silamalay satalakaway a duba maselep , nika caay katatudung kuselep , sen-he-say VTA ahemaway a silamalay uduba malalamel a ngatu 25-35mph(40-55km/h),tecek akitidaan 50-55mph(80-90km/h). VTAŤľēŤĽĆÁöĄťÄüťôźś∑∑Ť°ĆŚúįśģĶ25-35mph(40-55km/h),ŚįąÁĒ®ŚćÄśģĶ50-55mph(80-90km/h). naemekan ś≠∑ŚŹ≤ sayaway a ahemaway a silamalay a si-tung i 19 a siki nu teban tahekal , itawyaaya tipid nu uma kumutengtengay . katukuh 1880 a mihcaan sa , malungatu idaw ku dingkiay a ahemaway a silamalay a si-tung tahekal . . Itawya patideng tu si-tung cacay ku tipid , kamusa u dadanay a sidingkiay a kadideng . wiyda u dadan nu calaycay caay kakapah henay , nika udadan caay kakapah , kyu itawya caay kaydih kymikacaway . u basu amala nu simalay a sapaculil sa , , nu dingkiay u masacacayay u tatelungan a mapapulungay a lusid . . Itawya idaw ku tanayu'ay a ahemaway a si-tung , , tini i pay-may-cuidaw kya mahidaay u tukayay a dingkiay a tipid "Interurban" ahemaway a tipid a si-tung . . tini i ci-ya-na-ta an-ta a kitidaan , u mahiniay a si-yung sa u "milintugingay a dadan nu silamalay" . nadikuda u mahiniay a kaku nu dadan nu dingkiay a tipid tini i dipun cin-ci a kitidaan macakat tuway , i pan-sen, pan-ci, cin-ti a kusi yadahay a dadan nu silamalay nu nuayawan naming kuyda u micalapay tu si a dadan , nu pan-ciy a dingkiay a dadan katukuh ayda idaw henay mahida hena nu sayaway nadikudan sa u mahiniay a kaku alaen nu dupu a kusi mala nu kuzin a silamalay a kusi u sapi nanam . katukuh 1950 a mihcaan nadikudan , u dadan nu basu yadah tuway , ahemaway a dadan nu silamalay tadudududuc sa tastasen . . ayda cay tu kapapina ku mududucay tu nu kakawsan a dadan nu silamalay "u siyang-kang a subal u dingkiay a si-tung" , ni ka ina ahemaway a ngangan nu silamalay sa u sapatinaku acacay idaw adidi' ku cayay kalecad a si-tung . namakay 1980 a mihcaan malingatu , idaw ku duma a tukay misabaluhay pacumud tu ahemaway a silamalay a dadan a si-tung , ÁĒĪ1980 , ni ka ina mahiniay a si-tung micapi tu lala'ay a sapalineng nu tukay a dada nu tipid a si-tung . Ina baluhay a si-tung a cacanan mala nu aydaay tu , , atu micukaymad tu yadahay a tipid ni silamalay .šĽ•ŚŹäšĹŅÁĒ®Ś§öÁĮÄÁöĄŚąóŤĽä. Ina baluhan a si-tung u laad mahida u luma atu luma' maka cacay a ing-li kya idaw ku cacay a pahanhanan . duma a dadan patideng tu talakaway a dadan . . aydaay a ahemaway a dadan nu silamalay a si-tung kinacacay aca mala nu kitakit nu yadahay a tukay amanamuh micukaymas . Anu u kakawsan u baluhay aca a ahemaway a dadan nu silamalay a si-tung , papilecad han atu nu basu atu ciy-in a si-tung "BRT" idaw ku kapahay (BRT),ŚÖ∂ŚĄ™ťĽěśúČ
